title: Review a reusable or composite workflow change
description: Trace inputs, secrets, and permissions across the caller/callee boundary before changing a shared workflow.
body: Steps: 1. Identify every caller of the reusable workflow (workflow_call) or composite action. 2. Map declared inputs and secrets: passed explicitly vs inherited via secrets: inherit. 3. Check the permissions the called workflow assumes and whether callers grant more than needed. 4. Assess blast radius: a change here ships to all callers at once. 5. Stage the change behind a versioned ref and update callers deliberately. Rollback point: pin callers to the prior SHA/tag of the reusable workflow. Validation: each caller still runs with least-privilege token and only the secrets it requires.
